name: Binary Tree DFS Traversals
description: Given the root of a binary tree, return its preorder, inorder, and postorder traversals. Preorder: root, left, right. Inorder: left, root, right. Postorder: left, right, root.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [0, 100]. -100 <= Node.val <= 100.

performance.stress_intent: exercise preorder/inorder/postorder traversal correctness; constraints are too small for tighter separation than repeated rescans
